name: libcpan-changes-perl
title: libcpan-changes-perl
summary: module for reading and writing CPAN Changes files
description:
module for reading and writing CPAN Changes files
CPAN::Changes is a Perl module for working with the quasi-standard Changes
file commonly included with modern CPAN distributions. It allows developers
to programmatically read and write files that comply with the preliminary
CPAN::Changes::Spec specification.
.
Includes Test::CPAN::Changes for writing tests to ensure that the
Changes file complies with CPAN::Changes::Spec.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use tidy_changelog because module for reading and writing CPAN Changes files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use tidy_changelog as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair tidy_changelog with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `tidy_changelog --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
